name: AgentMesh OpenClaw Governance
description: Adds AGT policy enforcement and audit hooks to OpenClaw tool execution.

policyFile.description: Absolute or working-directory-relative path to a JSON policy bundle.

policies.description: Inline AGT policy objects loaded directly into the OpenClaw governance adapter.

agentId.description: Logical AGT agent identifier used in policy and audit records.

agentDid.description: Logical AGT DID used for policy evaluation.

failClosed.description: When true, policy and audit failures deny tool execution instead of throwing.

enabled.description: Enable or disable AGT audit logging.

stdout.description: Emit structured AGT audit records to stdout.

maxEntries.description: Maximum in-memory audit entries retained by the SDK logger.
